filter.name: financial_year
filter.domain: [ ('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=4, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=0 if context_today().month < 4 else 1, month=3, day=31)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')) ]

filter.name: last_financial_year
filter.domain: [ ('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-2 if context_today().month < 4 else -1, month=4, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=3, day=31)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')) ]

filter.name: apr
filter.domain: [('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=4, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=4, day=30)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]

filter.name: may
filter.domain: [('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=5, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=5, day=31)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]

filter.name: jun
filter.domain: [('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=6, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=6, day=30)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]

filter.name: jul
filter.domain: [('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=7, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=7, day=31)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]

filter.name: aug
filter.domain: [('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=8, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=8, day=31)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]

filter.name: sep
filter.domain: [('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=9, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=9, day=30)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]

filter.name: oct
filter.domain: [('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=10, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=10, day=31)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]

filter.name: nov
filter.domain: [('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=11, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=11, day=30)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]

filter.name: dec
filter.domain: [('date', '>=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=12, day=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')), ('date', '<=', (context_today() + relativedelta(years=-1 if context_today().month < 4 else 0, month=12, day=31)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]
